They’re also easy to clean. I would recommend theses to my friends if I had any. Review 6: rating 4.0. So far, so good. In an attempt to reduce waste and save costs, I purchased these pods based on other reviews. I’ve been using them about two weeks now and have to say overall I’m pretty pleased.

I do get some silt in the bottom of my cup, so I generally do not drink the last little bit. I may experiment with grind size to help with this.

To aide in cleaning, I do allow the grinds to dry overnight, making them easier to release from the pod. Then a simple dunk in... Review 7: rating 5.0. I inherited a Keurig coffeemaker, but had been reading about how the pods are filling landfills, and causing global warming (something like that--you know what I mean). These are easy to clean and reinsert into the coffeemaker, with no garbage filling up the landfill. Review 16: rating 5.0. Happy coffee time! Definitely worth purchasing if you are a Keurig user. I prefer different brands than often are available as pre-mades, and it's much lower in cost in use. Having 6 available, also makes it convenient when you're in a time crunch, avoiding the need to wash/clean out each time you want to make coffee.

[[ASIN:B01AUBYMK2 6-Pack Reusable Gold Plated Mesh Coffee Filters For Keurig 2.0 and 1.0 Brewers Fits K200/K250, K300/K350, K400/K450/K460, K500/K550/K560]... Review 17: rating 3.0. Review 18: rating 4.0. great I can confirm this works with the 2.0. no problems at all, forget all the tricks and bs just buy this. great product Review 19: rating 1.0. One Star Did not fit my K155. Review 20: rating 2.0. Coffee too weak! These cups are a good idea and I wish I could use them. They fit our machine and don't overflow or break as others have mentioned. The biggest issue we have is that the coffee is too watery. I tried different grinds and even packed the coffee as tightly as I could, to no avail, they just don't produce a nice, bold cup of coffee that we are used to. Will be returning them.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. Used for years, but not compatible with some newer models (K-Mini, specifically) Was recently gifted a K-mini brewer and, to my disappointment, these refillable k-cups are *not* compatible with Keurig's K-mini brewer (purchased Oct 2018). The needle/load system is different than traditional Keurig brewers.

Otherwise; I've used this with an older Keurig brewer for many years with no troubles. Easy to fill, easy to wash, easy to use. Very recommended -- as long as you confirm compatibility. Hopefully the makers of these will make a version compatible with the K-mini soon.

reference_output: rating 5.0. The Heat of the Moment This is stamped as a real Whirlpool part.  Installs in seconds. rating 2.0. They changed the filters, not good! These are great! Easy to use with the Eco-Fill 2.0 Deluxe single serve coffee filter for Keurig 2.0 Series. Just pop in the filter, put in your favorite coffee, brew, and toss, it's that simple! I will be back to buy more when I get close to the end.

Update: 1/30/16 - I just received another order of 300. This time instead of being in a loosely packed bag and in a box, they were all placed tightly in a small box packaged in a larger box. The first problem I noticed was they were made of thicker paper, secondly, they were larger in size. I now have to carefully force them into my Eco-Fill 2 filter basket and make sure they retain their shape when doing so. Thirdly and most importantly, after the brewing cycle is complete I noticed it takes longer for my Keurig to push air through the filter to drain it, this is because the paper is more dense and does not allow for proper drainage when the air is pumped through it. I thought it would be okay at first, but now I'm concerned I could damage my machine as it is working harder to get the air through the filter. I'm going to see about returning these and see if I can get the smaller, less dense size.

I’m extremely pleased. Review 20: rating 4.0. Nice washer Pros:

Good price.

Cons:
Fairly heavy.

If you scoot it at all the rubber feet leave nasty skid marks on your floor, easy to mop off but still annoying.

Came with cosmetic damage, just some dents, nothing I can’t liv...

Loving how much easier it is to have a fully auto washer. Foot print is not too big. 100% recommend it.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. ~ So Helpful against Dry Air and Static Electricity AND Adds WARMTH ~ This Indoor Lint Trap Filter actually traps the lint while it humidifies and warms the air in our back room and kitchen area, which is wonderful for the dryness in the air that the heater gives off. Also, as a bonus, with the dryer air staying in the house, there is the added bonus of the inside of the house smelling nice instead of the clean clothes scent all escaping to the outside. It would be nice if the unit was larger so you didn't have to change the water reservoir as often. Anyways I still recommend this for sure. Review 3: rating 2.0. Sounds like a great indoor filter but there is lint all over the room the it is in , it is probably better than nothing, I had to put a another filter (a nylon) over the vent to catch the lint but what a hassel Review 4: rating 3.0. It absolutely must be cleaned after every dryer load or we get little to no drying action. Review 5: rating 4.0. It works well The lint filter works well and does save money on heating bills. One Star Don't recommend it. I makes the room too humid and hot. I Review 7: rating 4.0. Big Improvement Over Others - Finally Say Goodbye to Indoor Snow Basically, if you have an electric dryer, three things come out of the vent: heat, humidity, and the lint that gets through the lint filter inside the dryer. If you want to get rid of the heat and humidity, forget about this, because you need an outside vent. However, this thing solves the third problem in an elegant way, catching the lint in a fine mesh, metal screen so it doesn't blow all over your room. It is also... Review 8: rating 5.0. Ok, if any of you have that stupid rectangular box vent that goes on the floor, you will LOVE this thing. The box vent on the ground made lint go everywhere. .

Review 1: rating 5.0. Five Stars makes ice quickly. works as described Review 2: rating 5.0. Nice little countertop ice maker! Great little machine that makes ice pretty quickly! Works perfectly and quietly I just unpacked it and added water, it quickly filled the small bucket with thumb sized ice cubes. Don't forget to remove all the little pieces of packing tape inside the machine first, there are a couple of pieces way inside where the water freezes.
Update: still love it but hard to clean Review 4: rating 5.0. An Ice Making Monster! A while back the ice maker on our fridge broke down for the second time in eight months. This time the fridge wasn't under warranty, and Sears wanted $100++ to come out to fix it. Hmmm...I could do that--or I could buy this handy dandy little dude for less than that, and get the extended warranty to boot, for less than a Sears service call. Not a fully refrigerated unit like large sized ice machines. Review 19: rating 5.0. Great product and company Makes ice quickly and is very quiet. I'm very pleased with my purchase. Great product!

Makes enough ice for the two of us and more I love ice, and took this camping. It kept the two of us in plenty of ice. I put excess in baggies and in the freezer of our trailer. When taken out, they do stick together, but I just smacked the baggy with a large spoon and the ice broke apart.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Cool looking machine, but 20 plus pounds of ice a day is not realistic... Okay, so heres the deal with this thing... I almost hate to give this 3 stars cause its actually a well made machine and looks really cool. The problem is it just doesn't make enough ice. They through these big numbers out their like 20 plus pounds of ice in 24 hours, but the problem is you would need to LITERALLY need to stand beside this machine and run it for 24 hours. The truth is it makes about a gallon size ziplock bag of ice a day. Again, this is because nobody has time to stand near the machine and empty the tiny tiny basket thats inside of it or continuously fill it with water all day long. So my point is, if you REALLY need 5 to 20 pounds of ice daily, I would look into something more heavy duty.

going to order regular white ones and throw these in trash Review 16: rating 5.0. Fits Hamilton beach single serve. This brand has been the best by far. I am the unofficial Maker of the Coffee in our house (because he makes a ... Review 18: rating 1.0. Review 19: rating 1.0. Not worth buying These K cup filters are the worst I have ever tried. I usually just buy whichever ones are in stock and are a good price. These fall apart which make them pretty useless when the reason I use them is for quick clean up. When they fall apart you also get grinds in your coffee which isn't a good thing. I would go with another brand. Review 20: rating 3.0. They work, but at twenty cents a cup, I don't know These filters will make your coffee taste better. They eliminate the sediment that can make coffee taste bitter. They also help save water as you don't need as much to clean out the plastic filter. Emptying the plastic filter is easy once you pop some of the coffee out. Here's a tip: When you put the paper filter in the plastic, wet the filter a little; it allows for more coffee. My one big gripe? They make each cup twenty cents more...
reference_output: rating 3.0. Water does not flow good through them. The water backs up in them and causes an over flow.

persona: This customer prioritizes functional upgrades and ease of installation when replacing kitchen or bathroom ventilation units, values clear product compatibility for ducted setups, and is willing to invest time in installation despite challenges, but expects reliable performance and proper airflow direction without design compromises.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Superior Product Purchased this range hood for non-ducted installation. I paid 270 dollars for the hood and 20 dollars for the charcoal filter (you will have to buy lamps and filters separately) at amazon.com. In last one month we have been using it and are very satisfied with it. Review 2: rating 5.0. It's So Alluring and I Can See the Light! This is a great hood that looks sharp above my new gas stove -- much better than the old microwave with hood! I really like the fact you can use halogen bulbs, which make things really bright for cooking. There are 3 fan speeds and 3 light settings. I'm very happy, even though my setup is ventless, it still gets the job done -- quietly, too. The fact you can use this in any configuration is a wonderful feature. Thanks, Broan! Review 3: rating 4.0. BROAN RANGE HOOD Arrived quickly and the hood was securely packed...it is installed in our new house and looks really nice...the highest fan level is noisy but so are all of the ones I researched. Lights are bright and the price on AMAZON was the best out there. Cannot comment yet on the efficiency of the hood because we are not in our house yet...so I am counting on all of the many reviews I have read and BROAN'S reputation. Review 4: rating 5.0. Great HOOD ! I originally purchased this range hood at a local store, after watching the Internet for a few months and not being able to find it at a lower price. Before I even opened it, I decided to check the Internet (one more time) and wouldn't ya know it... there it was on sale on Amazon for $56 bucks cheaper! I ordered from Amazon and then returned the locally bought, unopened one to the brick and mortor store. If this had been just a little difference in price, I would not ... Review 5: rating 5.0. Boran 30" allure II Great looking hood. Not that hard to install. I used two sticks 30 inches long and two pices of 1/4" plywood 6"x12" to support the hood on install. While the wife held the hood in place, I put the plywood on the range and then used the 30" long sticks to hold up the back of the hood. While she held the front of the hood I installed the screws. A little trick that worked great. So far the hood has worked great. I'm more than happy with it. Review 6: rating 5.0. Broan Allure II SS The research was well worth the effort. The Broan Allure II works just fantastic, even without a hood vent. the two charcoal filters, which are not included, and the quiet fan make quick work of the heat and/or smoke. We went with the two halogen bulbs, which are not included, as they gave off much more light in the cooking area. The unit looks great in our newly remodeled kitchen. We coudn't be happier. Review 7: rating 4.0. range hood This hood lives up to expectations for quiet and cleanability. The only problem so far has been that the lights flicker and sometimes go out. They are restored with a little jiggling. This indicates a faulty socket or connection to socket. I'm not about to make a warranty claim, as that would entail removing the hood, shipping it, and eventually re-installing-- not easy or pleasant tasks. Review 8: rating 5.0. Broan Exhaust Fan Great exhaust fan - very quiet. Out of the box it is designed for non vented installation. The fan must be configured (changed) for using vented installation. I recommend getting assistance during the installation when attaching the fan to an overhead cabinet. Connecting the fan to an existing exhaust vent can be difficult. I also recommend purchasing a damper during the installation (to keep cold air out of the house). Review 9: rating 5.0. Really nice! The wall my stove is located on an internal wall that is 25 ft to the nearest external wall, so a real vented system would be too costly ($6-8k) to install. I was very surprised this unit does well with odors and heat. Installation was straight forward - I recommend two people. The vent on high is fairly quiet - not to bothersome to have a conversation while it is on. It is super quiet on low and mid speed. The lights (50w) halogen) is really nice. My only concern ... Review 10: rating 5.0. Great Looks great. Well made. Two filters, on each side of hood, make for excellent removal. Two lights make for excellent visability. Three light and fan selections make for a comforable cooking experience. Worth the money. Review 11: rating 4.0. new stainless range hood My wife and I bought a stainless refrigerator and wanted to replace the hood over the stove. We chose the broan hood. The cfm and the scone was a factor. I installed the hood with a little work whitch wasn't to bad. The hood is working out fine. My wife is happy with the air flow and lighting. It matches well with the rest of our appliances. Review 12: rating 5.0. Broan QS230SS Under Cabinet Range Hood A very nice fairly priced under cabinet rangehood for ducted or non ducted applications. I installed it with the non ducted alternative. The unit installed in a breeze. I had a question on the unit and called Broan's hotline. The customer service was fast, informative and friendly. A wonderful addition to our kitchen. Review 13: rating 3.0. Do not buy for a non-ducted install Just want everyone to know you should read the installation and use instructions on the manufactures website before purchasing a product. That was my mistake. I read lots of reviews to compare the different products I was interested in but not the instructions on the Broan site.

The ventless install seems rather hooky and likely to cause more noise, there should be sones ratings on the non-ducted install. The instructions say if you are ... Review 14: rating 5.0. Great product, gorgeous, very quiet Low speed fan is nearly noiseless; high speed nearly pulls flour off of the counter. Put in some PAR20 LEDs that provide significant task lighting on high and great low-power accent lighting on low. More time-consuming than expected to hang from our apparently non-standard cupboards (could've just drilled through the stainless to make new holes). Watch the stainless steel edges, they are very sharp! Definitely recommend, but take your time and ... Review 15: rating 5.0. Nice Have had for 3 years and works great. Still looks new and collects smoke very well. Insalation was east as well Review 16: rating 5.0. Excellent! I searched for some time to find best pricing and availability. Amazon performed.
Came in perfect condition and was easily installed.
"Looks Perfect" according to my wife.
Momma's happy, everyone's happy! Review 17: rating 3.0. could be a little nicer This is not a bad range hood, but the buttons for the fan and light controls make it look very cheep. Review 18: rating 4.0. Broan QS230SS Allure II 30-Inch Under-Cabinet Range Hood, Stainless Steel I purchased this from Amazon and was delivered on time without any problem. It took me about 2 hours to install with my wife's help. I could not remove my range so installing is a little bit awkward as I have to lean to the range trying to push the hood up and it's heavy. I concur with other review that there is damper for the 7" round duct, but only for 3 1/4" x 10" duct. But since I only have ductless option,... Review 19: rating 4.0. Good value for the money Had to deal with a little rattle in the unit, but once remedied, performs well with three speed fan and three light levels. Review 20: rating 4.0. Great Looking and Quiet Very much like this hood. We were in the need for a "recirculating" hood and this did nicely. The fan is reasonably quiet (certainly more quiet than the builder-grade version we did have!) and it looks great! About my only complaint is that "auto" feature - when the hood thinks it's too hot, it'll turn on and exhaust the heat. Not a bad thing, but once it's on, you cannot turn it off until it thinks the temps have dropped enough. I don't l...
reference_output: rating 3.0. Poor engineering for ducted vent change over. Spent a few hour on the prep and install to replace an old kenmore unit.  Well now I think the Kenmore unit may have performed better, but looked worn out and had no style.  This Broan unit ships prepped for non vented set up.  The change over to vented was easy, and the mounting was typical for a replacement - nothing is as easy as you plan.  Ha!  But the 1st time I tested the vent fan I noticed it is spilling a lot of air out the non vent port on top of the unit.  It should not be doing this at all!!!!  I took it apart and tried to reseal the plastic device that is supposed to block off  the non vent port - I found the plastic blocking device was seated properly.  Put it back together and its only a bit better - still spilling air out the non vent port that should be totally blocked off. The seal of the plastic duct for non-vented application must not be seated properly against the weather stripping on the underside of the hood top.  I guess I will have to disassemble again, and tape off the dang vent openings permanently with aluminum duct tape from the inside of the hood. Poor design - I say this unit is built for non-vented applications first.  I would have paid a bit more $$ for a unit that was dedicated to ducted ventilation only, though it would be cheaper for Broan to produce a unit without the non-venting plastic duct and punched vent holes in the top of the hood.

I also have a slight burn in the back of my throat after drinking water with this filter. My kids don't, but I do. I just purchased a set of the purple filters based on advise from Amazon reviewer... Review 10: rating 1.0. Defective Filters DONT BUY FILTERS FROM THIS SELLER. This seems to be a common problem lately. I've emailed Whirlpool detailing the symptoms. Inconsistent Piece of Junk These filters are extremely inconsistent. Half the time I have to replace my filter I get one that barely allows any water to flow. I'm sick of spending fifty bucks on a piece of junk that may or may not do it's very basic job. If there was an alternative I would switch immediately. Review 14: rating 1.0. Defective filter Defective filter that produced pungent chemical taste in the water Review 15: rating 5.0. It works! Works good and fit in my whirlpool fridge Review 16: rating 1.0. This filter is horrible, my tap water tastes and smells better than ... This filter is horrible, my tap water tastes and smells better than what this filter does. I thought maybe I ordered a bad one 4 months ago, so I ordered another one and replaced it and its still awful. I do not recommend! Review 17: rating 3.0. Good Filter, but very expensive I like these filters and they work, but man they are way overpriced. I feel like I could just go buy a ton of bottled water that would last me as long as this does. Unfortunately I bought the fridge, so I am stuck with this high price filter. At least it gets the job done! Review 18: rating 4.0. It's a filter... Never had an issue. Not much to say here... It's a filter that goes in the fridge to filter our water and ice. It's very easy to install, just open the small door, pull old one out, line up two notches (inlet and outlet), push in and close the door. Very simple to install. Don't forget to run 2 gallons of water before use! It's just to make sure any lose material runs out and isn't ingested. Review 19: rating 1.0. DOES NOT WORK!! This filter only worked for two months. I got charged $9 in restocking fee for this crap!!!???
I have already gotten 3 filters which have not worked and they refunded me 1 and pending the second one for God knows why!!?? What is going on with this product??!!!
DO NOT BUY THIS. BE CAREFUL!!! Review 20: rating 3.0. Flush it out first! I've gone through two filters and am very pleased with the taste, quality and product in general. My only complaint is that when it is first installed, the instructions say you have to flush the filter for 4 gallons. It takes about 15 minutes to stand at the refrigerator and press the water button, not to mention the waste of water (which I actually capture and use to water my plants). On my next order, I am going to look for a filter that doesn't require so much ...

This did not fix my problem at all, the tub still bangs on the spin cycle.

Then one day I stumbled across these on Amazon and figured I'd give them a try. Wow, was I impressed. I'll never purchase an LG front loader again but if you made the same mistake as me definitely give these pads a try. Review 11: rating 4.0. I make sure to evenly balance items out front to back and side to side. If I get it right, she purrs like a kitten. If not, she can still hop around like a jumping bean. Review 12: rating 5.0. PEACE AT LAST I am a 75 yr. old widow who lives alone in a rural setting. Got so tired of my TOP loading washer traveling across the main floor laundry room and shaking the entire house that I just knew I must do something to rectify the problem. Found these Anti Vibration Pads for a decent price (as compared to all others on-line and in-store) then wondered how in the world I'd be able to install them. Since I have no friends or neighbors able to help it became another DIY projec... Review 13: rating 5.0. great deal and product! fast shipping! like many people, we were surprised to see our frontloaders floating across the wash room. after buying these, this no longer happens! thank you! Review 14: rating 5.0. Amazing! My front-load washer used to slide at least a few inches on my cement basement floor after spinning my clothes dry and I'd have to push it back in place regularly. During an unbalanced load spin I would hear a pounding sound throughout the whole house. Something had to be done so I searched Amazon and here is the solution. These pads have solved the pounding sound and the washer remains in place with even the most heavy loads. They are solid, well-built, a great price, and ... Review 15: rating 5.0. Our washer was vibrating so much... Our washer was vibrating so much it was moving away from the wall when ever we used it.
We had tried "vibration blocks" form an appliance store, ($34.00) and the washer kept vibrating off them.
These pads have an indentation for the feet to set in, so they stay in place. Take the time to level your
washer when you install these pads. Review 16: rating 5.0. I am VERY pleased! They are more substantial (larger and thicker) than ... I am VERY pleased! They are more substantial (larger and thicker) than the different brand they replaced. The old ones had collapsed, and I was getting a lot of vibration (throughout the house!). The dryer is on the second floor and it really shakes the house without these. For me, there are worth every penny. So far (a couple of weeks) they have not moved (the dryer has not walked off of them). Great pr... Review 17: rating 5.0. not bad! this product is wonderful piece of rubber pads. its stop the noise and settled the machine once and for all. no more vibration and annoying noise. easy to installed as long as you followed the machine instruction manual before you place the pads on it. very easy! no mathematics involve, but its all depends on your machine quality and condition. this cannot solve the issues if you have the basic and run down model. but you can always give a try. goodluck! Review 18: rating 2.0. Didn't work. Returned Didn't work to reduce front load washer vibration. Returned. Review 19: rating 3.0. Not sure why the adhesive disks aren't included with this product. Seems ridiculous to exclude an essential part for this product and make the customer buy it separately. Just include it in the package and charge a bit extra. Review 20: rating 5.0. Get these. Stop washer creep! We have a front loading washer upstairs that has vibrated so badly over the years that it actually shakes the pipes in the walls, along with "walking" itself halfway across the room. These pads work! Since we put them in service the washer hasn't moved one iota. I wish I'd had them years ago.
reference_output: rating 1.0. One Star I think this was a waste of money. It didn't do  hardly anything to stop the vibration.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. great communication from seller I saved a lot of money buying from BlueStar instead of directly from the manufacturer! Fast shipping; packaged well; great communication from seller. The pump was super easy to install, and works great - fits perfectly, and no leaks. I will definitely come back to BlueStars for future needs! Review 2: rating 5.0. $28 versus $300? We have a Kenmore Elite HE3, circa 2008. It would not drain. Googled the error code, and did the no-cost responses. Cleaned the hoses, cleaned the trap/filter. Ran a test, and it still would not drain. Ordered the pump.

Received it in about a day and a half. It does not look exactly like what we had, but the parts married up well, and after another half hour or so on the floor it was time to give it a shot. Ran a rinse and drain without issue. Ran ... Review 3: rating 5.0. Installed in minutes. Different design from the original pump ... Installed in minutes. Different design from the original pump, but interfaces perfectly with the filter housing. No more "F2" or "sud" errors! Half the price of the OEM spec pump too. My washer is a Kenmore He3t, model 11044832200.

FYI - Even though the original pump spun fine when bench tested, it was evidently not pumping properly and needed to be replaced. Review 4: rating 5.0. I'm happy with the purchase and the money I saved by ... This drain pump is working perfectly. I'm happy with the purchase and the money I saved by buying it. It's exactly as described and was easy to install. Thank you! Review 5: rating 5.0. Good Replacement Unit with Great Customer Service Great unit for the price. This is a replacement part, not an OEM unit. This does not diminish the quality. In fact, this unit, while a slightly different design (three blades vs four, heat dissipation, no cover for electronic plug), it does fit snugly and appears to have a better extraction rate than the original unit. It is slightly louder although had less vibration than the OEM. It is working well. No F2 codes and was able to... Review 6: rating 4.0. It worked for a couple years I have a Kenmore HE 4t washing machine that is around 12 years old. We started getting the F02 and SUD errors. The coin screen was pretty clean. The pump sounded like it was having a hard time -not strong squish, squish sound. I took it apart after watching some youtubes and the impeller was loose, like about to fall off. Ordered this pump even though it looked very different. It fit, sort of. There was a gap between the pump and plastic drain piec... Review 7: rating 5.0. Saved $$$ Our Whirlpool Duet washer would not drain, the door was locked and was displaying a F21 error. Service calls are never cheap, so I decided to attempt this one myself. Drained the washer, removed three screws and the old one came off. This new one matched up, attached the screws and we're done. It took about 20 minutes and probably saved hundreds. Review 8: rating 4.0. Works This pump works well so far for me. I’ve only done a few loads of laundry but seems quiet and pumps the water out!! Having a spare o ring is a nice touch.
My only con is the way my package was packed. The pump was in a box originally then seller put the box was in a envelope. The box when I recorded it was demolished and pump housing was damaged. It still worked so I kept it. But seller should of known to package better. Review 9: rating 2.0. Ordered in January, broke in June Fit perfectly in place of the original pump. Left the front panel off for the first load to make sure there weren’t any leaks. Works great! Special thanks to YouTube for the video on how to do it. My 13 year old Kenmore Elite is back in business.

persona: This customer prioritizes product durability and functional reliability, especially for daily-use kitchen appliances, and is highly sensitive to performance issues like clogging or structural failure; they value long-term usability and are likely to discontinue use and seek refunds when products fail prematurely despite maintenance efforts.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Broke Broke within a few weeks

Review 2: rating 5.0. Love this coffee filter! I bought this filter and though, "Wow! People seem pretty excited about this coffee filter. What can possibly be that great about it?" It really is that great. It funnels all of the drip coffee efficiently so it doesn't get stuck to the sides of the glass when I'm using my Chemex and take forever. It's also super easy to clean and stays looking like new - no weird stains or hard to scrub spots. We truly use this every day and it's one of the better purchases ...

Review 3: rating 3.0. It’s great...until it isn’t. It’s great...until it isn’t. I’ve tried 2 or 3 variations of this type of filter and they’ve all worked great, until they clog up. Daily cleaning, soak it in vinegar, use the cleaning brush...doesn’t matter. Takes about a month before it clogs up but, at some point, it’s going to clog up and your coffee experience in the morning will have to wait...and wait...and wait.

Review 4: rating 2.0. Slow decline For the first month or two, it was brilliant! I was so happy to not waste the paper filters. Then it slowly stopped working as well. After a minute or two the flow slows down so it takes a loooooooong time to make coffee. Now, the rubber gasket thing has fallen off and WILL NOT go back on.

Review 5: rating 1.0. Fell apart in less than 3 months of daily use Ordered one July 23rd. It arrived timely and appeared to be good quality. Skeptical about this because of reports about clogging. Pleasantly surprised this was not an issue with routine cleaning. The brew was good for less than three months, then it came apart. The cone detached from the rim and our Chemex is full of grounds! So sad, we wanted this to work. Could not find warranty information through Amazon or seller’s store. Hence this n...

Review 6: rating 3.0. The cons outweigh the pros Will save you money on paper filters but.  Removing the grinds after every  use is messy and the grit you get in the bottom of your cup that a paper filter would have filtered doesn't justify the convenience or money you will save.

Review 7: rating 1.0. It’s impossible to clean thoroughly. I’ve had this for about a year now. My coffee has been tasting worse and worse, couldn’t understand why. Today I realized that you CANNOT completely clean this filter. Coffee gets stuck in between the two layers of filter and it’s impossible to clean without dismantling it. I’m afraid I’ve been drinking rotten moldy year old coffee caked up inside this thing. Unfortunately paper filters are safer than this.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Coffee Lovers, Find something Else Water drips so slowly the coffee is cold by the time a cup is made

Review 9: rating 1.0. Extremely slow I used the same amount of coffee and water as I have with other metal mesh filters and this thing is SLOW. Took about 20 minutes to get one cup of coffee, with other filters it would take about 5 minutes.

Review 10: rating 1.0. One Month Clogged up At first, this product seemed to work as good as a competitor filter that I have used for a year.  That lasted for a about a month and then it clogged up.  Then, I used vinegar and water for cleaning as it suggested and it didn't seem to make a difference.  My wife used straight vinegar.  Still clogged.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Makes perfect pour over! I’ve been using this just about daily for six months and I love it!! It’s so much easier than using paper filters and more economical. No more issues with occasional filters breaking mid pour. This thing is sturdy and fits my Chemex perfectly. It comes with a soft bottle brush to clean it. Would definitely recommend this item.

Review 12: rating 2.0. Infuriatingly slow with espresso ground beans. ONLY use coarse grind. Immediately clogs with fine and even regular grind beans. Only works with a very coarse grind.

Review 13: rating 2.0. Disappointing Watery Coffee The water passes through this filter waaay too fast even with a meticulous slow dripping pour. I added a paper filter which helped but completely defeats the purpose. I really miss my previous filter which broke apart after years of use. This filter is a waste of money.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Exactly as described This filter arrived quickly and is just what I needed to enjoy freshly brewed coffee.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Minimalist function and beauty Simply the most museum worthy coffee filter any Java enthusiast would love. It's gorgeous, works great and cleans fast. Chemex never had it so good.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Had it for Years -- Still Awesome I bought this during the C19 shortage of paper Chemex filters, so it's been 2 years now and it still works great, tastes great, and saved me who-knows-how-much money on paper filters. Very happy :)

Review 17: rating 5.0. Great taste with less mess! The edge of the filiter fits over the top edge of the Chemex coffee pot. Helps to keep the loose coffee grains from getting into the coffee. Easy to clean!

Review 18: rating 5.0. It's definitely Paperless I've used it for a couple of days, and have to say it's living up to the happy reviews. I'm using it with the Bodum 1 Liter pour-over coffee maker, into which fits perfectly, and am taking my time. The result is definitely what I had hoped for. Being a double-layer filter, not even fine-ground coffee grains slip through, making additional paper filters unnecessary. I couldn't be more pleased.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Plugged up too much to use after 1 month This is the second one of these I've purchased, the first one made it about a year before it got too clogged up to use anymore, this newest one only made it a month. Tried everything to keep it clean and deep clean it; poured boiling water through after every use, boiled in water several times, boiled in vinegar, nothing worked. Takes about 30 minutes for coffee to filter through when it should take 2 and the coffee tastes much worse for it. Great idea/concept, just wish they worked well enough to warrant it.

rating 4.0. Recycle Hack Well, anyone who owns a Samsung French Door Refrig with a POS Ice Room Ice Maker knows that even after applying all the fixes, they'll still be hair-dryer defrosting it, every ~3 months; I've got it down to ~15 minutes now. So instead of buying a new refrigerator-with-ice-maker-in-the-freezer-drawer (at C0stc0), I decided to limp it along another year and buy another filter. There's just the two of us in the household and I've calculated we dispense <300gal through the filter annually PLUS we have a clean water supply, so I ignore the 6 month reminder and replace it every December.
The filter is a simple plastic 1/4" thick, two piece plastic cartridge with 3 rubber o-rings, housing the carbon-filter insert. It's not difficult to disassemble the filter for recycling/disposal:
1) remove the o-rings with an awl or precision mini bladed screwdriver. shake out the water.
2) clamp the filter in a vise or brace appropriately
3) (hack)saw 1/4" deep around the diameter at the cartridge seam, about 1/3 up from the bottom.
4) discard the carbon-filter insert and recycle the two plastic cartridge pieces.
Maybe call your recycler and confirm they recycle Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS) (7).
Remember to run 3 gallons of water through your new filter. Maybe water the plants, fill a toilet tank, or clean the sinks and use it for rinse water.

To sum up, the original one died, this replacement works as well as the original used to and wasn't difficult to replace. Review 5: rating 2.0. Worked for 6mo Worked great for 6mo, then burned out. Don't throw the old one away until you get the part, you will have to transfer a overheat sensor (no instructions included). The part number is different from the original, and prices on the internet are all over the map. This was on the low end of the range, and the quality and match is as good as it can be. persona: This customer prioritizes product accuracy, reliability, and compatibility, especially for functional devices like hygrometers and kitchen components; they value calibration options, durable materials, and responsive customer support, and are willing to replace items that fail repeatedly, but remain loyal to brands that stand behind their products and deliver consistent performance.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Do not waste your money This product exhibits a consistent 20% to 25% error on the hygrometer reading. One would be more accurate with humidity numbers by simply estimating based on observation of the environmental surroundings. Don't waste your money on cheap measuring instruments if you need even a semblance of precision or accuracy. Review 2: rating 1.0. Sporatic Readings Like others have stated this things started off perfect then about 2 months later I started getting low readings. I had another hygrometer for 4 years with no problems and side by side they were sometimes in range and other times 5% apart. I bought a boveda calibration kit and tested my 4 yr old hygrometer which was perfect and for 20 hrs didn't budge off 75%rh. Next this InkBird and I quickly realized the problem. It changes rh every few hours. It went up and down ... Review 3: rating 1.0. Works well. Takes CR2032 battery. -- Update -- can't read display Seems to work fine, but I haven't tried the salt in a bag test to see how accurate the hygrometer is. It's nice and compact, but I'm not a fan of the small CR2032 lithium battery it uses. I'd prefer if the unit were bigger and could use AAA or AA batteries which are less expensive.I'm pleased with this though.

***UPDATE*** - Reduced to 1 star... Display seems to have failed. Only part of the numbers are legi... Review 4: rating 1.0. Did not work well! Could not get it to dial in accurately, I took it out & ordered a different unit, and it worked great. Review 5: rating 1.0. Stay Away No not buy. This is what I received as NEW Review 6: rating 4.0. So far so good... This product seems to be built well, and for the price, a good value. That being said, I'm still only using it for non-critical applications. It's being used inside of a snake enclosure providing temperature and humidity readings. I have probes used to automatically switch on heating pads, heading lights, lights, etc, which don't go on/off based on these readings. This seems slightly off +/- 3º, but it works for a general visual to ensure the environment is "wit... Review 7: rating 4.0. Amazingly accurate straight out of the box! I was quite surprised by this product. Based on the price, I thought it was going to be sub par. But when I “salt cap” tested this digital thermometer / hydrometer, I was amazed that it was accurate straight out of the box- no calibration was necessary (it read 75% RH after 8 hrs). It does take a while to accurately read humidity levels, however. But you can leave it on constantly and check it as needed. Comes with Velcro, so you can stic... Review 8: rating 1.0. Customer service sucks Be forewarned that Inkbird’s customer service is all but non existent. No phone number or address just a Facebook messenger link. It took 16 days for them to reply to my initial inquiry.and they didn’t even address the question. They just asked if I had solved my problem. at this rate it will be months before I can even get my question answered Review 9: rating 2.0. Two Stars It is not very accurate off by 5 points Review 10: rating 1.0. Second time I've ordered this, months apart, and same problem: On/Off switch. Today:
I ordered another one of these (months apart from first order), thinking I'd have better luck. Not.
I opened the guitar case and it's not working. The slider switch is on. It's not working. I press the slider switch down and it comes to life, displaying Celsius instead of Fahrenheit. I take my finger off and it turns off. Press the slider switch again it comes back on again, Celsius.... Review 11: rating 2.0. Hygrometer very inaccurate Perhaps I just got a bad one, but the hygrometer appears to be complete junk. I was concerned about the accuracy of my existing hygrometer in a humidor so I ordered a few others to get a consensus and determine which are most accurate. In addition to the two others shown I also have a Bluetooth one that connects to my phone and is reading 77.5%. So while three of them read 77-79% humidity, the Inkbird reads 32%! I‘ll be sending this one back. Review 12: rating 1.0. Disappointed Product isn’t accurate at all not even close. Very disappointed. I have an accurate hygrometer calibrated in my humidor that’s not digital. I bought since it was suggested by most cigar enthusiasts. It was a waist of money. Review 13: rating 2.0. Not for me Completley inaccurate. I thought I had a bad unit and Inkbird replaced without hassle. Unfortunately, had same issue with second unit. I use a brevard 75% pouch. My simple manual analog hygrometer reads a consistent 72%. The Inkbird is a consistent 61%. My cigars are fine so I know humidity is fine. Very disappointed. Review 14: rating 4.0. Great little machine! I ordered this product and ended up receiving a faulty unit. The company sent me a new one and it works really well. I tested its accuracy and response against a new General Electric Protimeter MMS2 and it is surprisingly accurate and adjusts itself at a good rate, and stays fairly consistent even when moving slightly or placing it in different places within short distances. Product is great for this price. My only concern is that it might not be durable enough ... Review 15: rating 1.0. Very inaccurate! Very inaccurate and can’t be calibrated! Review 16: rating 1.0. Two Stars Came with a nearly dead battery. Actually, the unit is just crap. I have replaced the battery and the unit still is barely visible on the readout. This lasts for about 10 seconds before it disappears and is unreadable. Find a better device. This one is useless and was a waste of money. Review 17: rating 5.0. smaller than a pack of gum Another one here who bought this specifically as a humidity meter for their guitar case. 24 hr exposure to the salt test yielded a RH of 73%, giving this hygrometer an accuracy tolerance of +/- 2%.

It's built surprisingly sturdy for something this inexpensive ($18.50 total). I was expecting the usual sloppy chinese plastic garbage, but the buttons and everything else are tight and the whole thing is smaller than a pack of gum. Battery included... Review 18: rating 4.0. Really good, starter hygrometer 11/18/2021 Update
Thanks to all for all the thumbs up received on this review. I was just rehydrating my humidor today & noticed there's a 5% difference between its analog hygrometer vs this digital one. Analog read 5% higher. For the price, this digital one is worth every penny. I hate soggy & dry smokes.

I like how well this product works so far. The only reason I didn't give it five stars is not because of the products inability t... Review 19: rating 3.0. Inaccurate Hygrometer Measurement. Purchased unit to monitor moisture level in guitars. Unit was well priced but not very accurate ( +15%) compared to several other hygrometers I own. I wish unit could be calibrated Review 20: rating 1.0. Inaccurate readings after about a month This hygrometer was perfectly accurate for the first month or so. After that, the humidity levels it displayed were off by about 10%. As you can see in the photo it shows a reading of 61, even right next to a 72% large boveda pack (the hygrometer built in to my humidor even reads ~70%). Hygrometer is totally inaccurate.

The thermometer seems to work fine, but this is useless to me without an accurate humidity reading. Unfortunately I...
reference_output: rating 1.0. No Accurate and no ability to calibrate Maybe close enough is ok for guitars, but after checking the calibration of this it becomes wildly (+10 to 15 usually) inaccurate over time (within hours) against good calibrated hygrometers.  This one is going back.  Would not trust anything of value with it

persona: This customer prioritizes compact, high-performance portable appliances that deliver reliable, quiet operation and ample capacity, seeking durable solutions that fit space-limited living situations without compromising on functionality or ease of use.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Bought new July 2019. Owned 5-6+ DDWs since 2001. Good to replace older models. Quiet. Cleans well. This model is much better than the DDW497 I replaced. The DDW621 is *far* quieter and cleans items in the dishwasher noticeably better.

There is one negative point. The left side has a pair of adjustable/removable shelves. In the DDW497, the comparable shelf was just low enough to allow a second set of cups to be on that shelf (four cups/tall glasses on the lower rack and fo... Review 2: rating 5.0. Excellent Moved into a new place with a small sink and no dishwasher, had an agreement with the wife that if she did the laundry, i'd hand wash all the dishes. I bought this the next day and she called me a cheater. It's very easy to use, setup is simple, it's quiet, very efficient, and holds a bit more than I expected. I absolutely love this dishwasher, although it's a bit of an eyesore on the counter, and is about two inches too wide to fit underneath the sink. If you are looking f... Review 3: rating 5.0. Good dishwasher to add in Our rental didn't include a dish washer and we didn't want to have to try and buy and install a full-size one so we got this. I had forgotten the convenience and effectiveness a dishwasher brings to the table. It hooks in easily, I would recommend double checking the connections before running it to prevent any leakage. Instructions say not to use dishwasher packs and to use dishwasher liquid cleaner, we've been using the liquid Cascade Platinum and haven't ... Review 4: rating 5.0. Time saver It came with the door latch snapped off, but I glued it with some e-6000. It works great. Review 5: rating 4.0. Great for small house hold this is very good machine, much better than i thought. ive been using this as i await my kitchen to be finish and we use it every day. its not for heavy duty cleaning but its great for wine glasses, coffee mugs and cereal bowls. you need to add the rinse aid and then you have clean dishes and glasses. has a short 20 min cycle for glasses that is great. easy to set up and comes with all the hook up items. Review 6: rating 5.0. so easy to hook up so easy to hook up, can fill a lot of dishes. so easy to use. We are getting a new baby in our house soon. Perfect for bottles. What a good investment. Review 7: rating 1.0. We love it! UPDATE: this broke a month or two later. The company sent us a replacement unit that also failed a few months after that. Do not recommend buying this.

We love this dishwasher. It is our first portable dishwasher, and we've used it heavily for the 4 months we've owned it. It cleans like a champ. We can even stack plates pretty close together and it cleans them well. We will often end up running it one or two times a day to get through all the dishes we use. It ... Review 8: rating 5.0. Works as expected. It isn't very loud and I've ... Works as expected. It isn't very loud and I've not seen a marked increase in my electric bill. I do wish it were a little taller so my full sized plates would fit in it, however, the plates are bigger than normal. Review 9: rating 4.0. Holds a surprising amount of dishes! Four months in and I'm still highly satisfied with this little dishwasher. Super easy set up and use, it fits perfectly where my old dish drying rack used to sit on the counter, snugly underneath my cupboards in a very old house. Cheap and easy. My bills have hardly moved, if anything I'm using less water now. (I wasnt very conservative when washing by hand...) With the included quick connect on the faucet it's pretty simple once you figure it all... Review 10: rating 4.0. It's bigger than you think. It's basically a smallish dishwasher. Does it do dishes as well as the full size models? Absolutely! It amazed me how the dishes done in this box are indistinguishable from dishes done in a full size unit.

I had fancied putting this inside of my bottom cabinet as one reviewer had mentioned, and I still might, but it's actually quite large. It's nearly 22 inches wide, 20 inches deep, and 18 inches tall. For comparison, the rough opening for a st... Review 11: rating 5.0. Why didn't I buy this 10 years ago? I hate washing dishes. This has changed my life. I actually have used it to wash dishes that have piled up for many days and it worked great!

I used Oxyclean Rinse Aid and Palmolive Platinum detergent pods.

It is SUPER quiet! I can stand right next to it and have a phone conversation.

Extra positive: I position the hot water being drained into sink over the items that don't fit in dishwasher and it helps make handwa... Review 12: rating 1.0. and what looked like water scale residue inside as well as water in ... Item came with several small dents, scrapes, and paint chipped off, and what looked like water scale residue inside as well as water in the intake valve area which indicates to me that the product wasn't new. Product was returned. Review 13: rating 5.0. Came w/ an adapter Great little machine, runs well and quiet. A little smaller than expected, dinner plates are difficult to put in, (not like the picture) but with alittle getting used to it's fine. I ordered an adapter for it but there wasn't a need to, it came with it attached already. It was packed well, no dents. Well worth the money for a small mobile dishwasher. Review 14: rating 4.0. Gets the plates hot Sometimes it doesn't rinse as well but over all a great little dishwasher. Especially since it heats water inside the machine. Review 15: rating 1.0. missing adapter for my faucet, manufacture ignores multiple emails faucet adapter included doesn't fit our faucet, emailed the manufacture a few times so far over 2 weeks no reply... what is the point if I can't connect it? going to return it Review 16: rating 5.0. I'm a fan We actually bought this for the trailer we've had to move into after a fire in our home. At first it was kind of a lark but the machine turns out to be pretty awesome. Some of the cycles can take up to an hour and a half but it is really quiet (to the point, where at first, I kept opening it to see if it was actually working - it was). It cleans dishes, glasses and flatware beautifully and sterilizes them. The downside is, well, it's a countertop dishwasher so it doesn't f... Review 17: rating 5.0. AMAZING Did 2 loads of dishes so far. This thing is AMAZING I used the mid grade of the cascade packs and I do believe what dish detergent you use matters. I had a bowl with melted chocolate in it from 2 days ago (no judging lol) that bowl is SPOTLESS I'm super impressed. Extremely quiet. It leaks a little at the faucet I've tightened everything best I can it's tiny drip doesn't seem to be causing any issues though. I have depression some days I wanna wash every dish in the house by ... Review 18: rating 5.0. This is roomy and works beautifully period completely easy to set up once I figure ... This is roomy and works beautifully period completely easy to set up once I figure it out that you can attach it to the sink with a quick attach piece either on the outside or the inside of the threading. I did get a little confused had to watch a YouTube video and then realize that the threading for a smaller sink is on the inside portion covered up by the washers. Other than that it attached easi... Review 19: rating 5.0. I freakin love this thing! It had been over 2 years since I had a dishwasher, and so I am just thrilled to find something that I can have in my small space, and it cleans well. It takes up my whole counter, but I already did food prep at the table, and the counter was cluttered. The capacity is like the equivalent of half of a regular dishwasher, but I don't mind doing more loads for the ease of not having to handwash anymore! I don't do a lot of rinsing or wiping beforehand and they... Review 20: rating 1.0. One Star Arrived broken. Had to return.
reference_output: rating 5.0. This thing is a work horse! I live in a rental and cannot install a permanent dishwasher, there is limited room for a full size portable one. I researched for weeks and settled on this one. Wow! Am I impressed. It's super easy to use and runs very quiet.  The only noise you really here is when the pump goes off. The pumps kind of loud but only for a couple of minutes till its done emptying. I cook and bake alot and this dish washer can handle what ever i throw at it. It can fit more then you think with some creative loading.  The only time i've had a problem with unclean dishes us when I've over loaded it. I use liquid dishwasher detergent and have no issues. One thing i do recommend is not to use to much detergent as it will leave spots ,less is more.  The filter in the bottom is removable and very easy to clean. This dishwasher fits perfectly under my cabinet.  I wanted it further away from the sink at the end if my counter so hubby went to the hardware store bought four clamps, the right size hoses and extended the lines, works beautifully. Bought a giant command hook and attached it to the side of the dishwasher,  just roll up the hose and store there when not in use. All in all I'm very pleased with my purchase and would definitely buy again.

persona: This customer prioritizes effective water filtration and consistent taste quality, is disappointed by performance issues that emerge over time, and values reliability and trustworthiness in product functionality over price or convenience.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Rust and ferrous metal. I guess you pay for what you get. One of the pods I've used so far contained a ferrous metal which rusted in the Keurig and caused damange to the machine. Review 2: rating 3.0. Google "keurig filter instructions" if you've never used a Keurig filter Paper included that says don't use before reading instructions --- no instructions included. just a web address that will not show anything unless you give them an email address. Sure sounds like a commercial spammer to me. So I had to google for the (simple soak, rinse, and use) instructions. Review 3: rating 5.0. Great filters! These filters were easy to install. Couldn’t tell they weren’t name brand. I will continue to purchase these filters! Review 4: rating 1.0. Will stain your Keurig Coffee Maker The first one I used left an orange stain on the water reservoir like rust there are other customers who added photos. I noticed it after a week of using it gross I drank that water for a week! Review 5: rating 1.0. Not the same filters as pictured. Not as described. These are not the same filters that are pictured. Review 6: rating 1.0. I can’t get them to work My machine seems clogged when using one of these filters. I tried two times. I followed instructions. I almost trashed my machine thinking it was damaged. Then I tried it without a filter. It took several tries but eventually I got a 6, 8, 10 oz cups of water. Very disappointed. Review 7: rating 1.0. It's Only a 6 pack. Buyer beware Since when does a 12 pack only contain 6 pcs? Not the last time I counted. They need to correct the listing because I only got 6. The outer pack states 12. Review 8: rating 5.0. Great Buy I purchased these filters because the actual Keurig filters are too expensive. You really need to follow the directions listed on each individual filter bag...soak the filter in water first, before placing into your Keurig. If you don't, the filter will be too dry to process the water and no water will get through it. These filters worked great, just like the expensive ones. I will be buying them again when it's time to restock! Review 9: rating 1.0. Doesnt work for Vue Systems! Due to lack of detail explanation for the Keurig Vue systems didnt realize these wont fit. Review 10: rating 5.0. Perfect fit and work like a charm! These are perfect for my Keurig and much less expensive. My second order of these and I’ll keep ordering them as I run out. Get them. You won’t be sorry. Review 11: rating 5.0. Works Well Bought these as replacements for the Keurig brand filters because of the price. They work well. Just make sure you follow the directions:

1. Let the filter soak in warm water for 15 minutes.
2. Rinse the filter under cold water for 30 seconds.
3. Install the filter.

This next step is not required but I also always run one brew of just water through the newly installed filter each time. They have worked well and come individually wrapped whic... Review 12: rating 1.0. One Star Still seeing brown stuff grow in water even with these filters. Review 13: rating 1.0. PLEASE READ-DO NOT BUY!!!! This is not the item I received. They are not individually sealed. They came loose in a bag. I rinsed the first filter before use and placed it in the Keurig, just as I have hundreds of times before. A few days later, the water in the reservoir was rusted and it was coming from the filter. I completely cleaned and descaled the machine. I proceeded to use a new filter, rinsing it under running water for 3 minutes, soaking it for 10, and then holding it under... Review 14: rating 5.0. Perform as well as Keurig OEM filters. The product arrived on time and packaged in a clear bag with instructions clearly written on it. At the time they arrived I had just replaced my Keurig filter, so I didn’t use them right away. Today I replaced it. I followed the soaking and rinsing instructions on the bag and which are the same as the OEM instructions. When I began soaking the filter I also pushed the filter under the water manually for a few seconds to insure the filter was com... Review 15: rating 3.0. Not sure. I purchased my second package but haven't opened it yet, still have 2 more from the first package. I've noticed the black cloudy water when I soak it for 15 minutes, not worried about that. Today I noticed a black ring (charcoal?) around the water dispenser and on the plastic filter holder. It was very hard to wash off. Now I'm afraid to open the new package. Never saw charcoal come out before and stain the plastic. Not sure why this is happening.
I was happy wit... Review 16: rating 4.0. Four Stars It was nice to buy them in quantity so they were a little cheaper Review 17: rating 1.0. Not good Not happy with these. I followed the prep instructions carefully and still had to run up to twenty cups of water through before there was no longer visible coal in the cup. Review 18: rating 5.0. Perfect replacement for Keurig filter Each is individually wrapped in plastic. I soaked it for an hour in a glass of water to get the "loose carbon" out and the water was a little cloudy. rinsed in water and then put it in the Keurig. Looks and fit just like the stock filter. Have had a few cups of coffee since and they are perfect! Definitely will buy these again and will also probably change my filter more frequently since these are much more affordable. Review 19: rating 5.0. Excellent buy for the price! Love, love, love my water filters! I'm a bit neurotic when it comes to switching out filters for my Keurig (Sally is what I've named her :) - so the simple fact 12 filters came in a pack for a reasonable price was huge! Would definitely purchase from this vendor again. The filters arrived quickly and were packaged nicely. Review 20: rating 3.0. These fit the Keurig. Whether they perform correctly remains ... These fit the Keurig. Whether they perform correctly remains to be seen. Seller is adamant about leaving review, so I am leaving a review. Have not had these long enough to rate any more that 3 stars, because I have no idea how they will perform. I only know that they fit the Keurig machine without issue.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money They're to big and don't fit in the pocket and the cover/door doesn't close

persona: This customer prioritizes functional compatibility and ease of cleaning when purchasing coffee pods, values reusable systems that reduce maintenance, and is sensitive to design changes that impact performance, often adjusting usage habits or switching methods when product quality declines.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. coffee paper filter These little filters allow me to use any coffee I choose instead of using the pods. The pods were too strong for me and by using these filters, I can adjust the coffee to my taste and also use any coffee I prefer. Review 2: rating 5.0. 5 Stars Filter works great with My K-Cup and, if you trim the edge, also works nicely with Java Jig. Best unit price I have found. Review 3: rating 2.0. Not exactly right These fit inside the Ekobrew system etc, but if you push it to the bottom to get as much coffee inside as you would without a filter you have to keep smoothing down the sides and it creates large folds where coffee can get trapped. After that, when it is time to empty the filter holder you still end up having to tap tap tap and rinse out extra grounds just like i would without a paper filter. I bought the paper filter to try to save time with the tap tap tap and rin... Review 4: rating 2.0. Would not use if you like strong coffee Placed filter inside Ekobrew Cup and the filled it with coffee....difficult since there filter gets crumpled and not much room to pour the coffee grinds into. Then tried to fill filter first and then place the filter in the Ekobrew....this was more difficult.

In either case, this does not allow you to put in the whole amount of grinds, thus resulting in a weaker cup of coffee.. If you like it weaker, then not a bad choice.
<... Review 5: rating 1.0. Too thick These filters are too thick and impede the flow of water. They also do not fit in my "Cafe Cup" reusable filter cups. Review 6: rating 4.0. Works perfect in the my k-kup off brand that I bought ... Works perfect in the my k-kup off brand that I bought at Food Lion. No more muck in the bottom of my mug. Review 7: rating 5.0. Review for the paper filters These work exceptionally well with the stainless steel ekobrew cups. Now paired with my favorite Green Mountain coffee, it's the closest I've been able to replicate the real k-cup. Close enough for the much lower price.

They also make clean up once you've made your coffee far easier. Fit well, just don't push it all the way down to the bottom. Another plus is it seems to eliminate the water spilling out from the top when just using the ekobrew ... Review 8: rating 5.0. These filters were just what I needed Work perfect and makes each cup I make in my own stainless ekobrew reusable brew kcup taste perfect. These were just what I was missing when making my own keurig pods. Review 9: rating 2.0. Topless These are just the bottom or basket of the filter. The idea was to get a filter that all the mess would go in the trash with the grounds. Since these are topless I still have to clean up the grounds that splash back. Review 10: rating 5.0. Great price, now my cup of coffee is even cheaper. Cheapest filters I've found and they are good quality. Don't have the top flap but 1/2 the price of others. Review 11: rating 3.0. Work reasonably well These filters do make cleanup easier and I don't want to be without them. After making a cup of coffee, you just pop the filter into the trash and then rinse the Ekobrew container. The container does have to be rinsed, though, as the hinged top juts into the coffee grounds and is covered with wet grounds after brewing. The only way to avoid this is to under fill the paper filter with coffee, but then the coffee is too weak. If you want to make a few cups of coffe... Review 12: rating 4.0. 3 stars I have previously ordered these filters however, this order if different. The filter paper is much heavier and does not fit as well, too big. They are usable. I modify them slightly by making some of the pleats bigger. Review 13: rating 5.0. Love these I'm on my second set of 300 and I really like these. Less mess and less clean up time. I would recommend these. Review 14: rating 2.0. Strange packaging and a bit too big!! well, i got these since i thought they were the same as the "Simple Cups 300"..
The pics looked the same and the price was about the same.

I got this Large box. The paper filters did not stack together properly so they took up 4X as much space as the simple cups.
So had to deal with a much bigger box in order to use them.

They are also a little big.. originally didn't think this was a big problem, but I us... Review 15: rating 1.0. What a mess!! These are absolutely horrible. They make a huge mess during the brew and there is no way to remove it without making more of a mess. You will never make a cup of coffee without having to wash your hands and wipe down the machine and counter. It would be much easier reverting to an old school coffee pot with filter and a scoop of ground coffee than to deal with the hassle of these things. Review 16: rating 5.0. Great product! I use these daily in my Keurig ... Great product! I use these daily in my Keurig coffee maker. Review 17: rating 4.0. Much cheaper than the one time use of a K-cup I use these in reuseable K-cups . I find they fit much better than some I tried .
The price for the amount is a bargain compared to other store brands. Review 18: rating 2.0. Poor Quality Unlike a similar product I have bought from Amazon, this is clearly inferior. There is little or no "lip" at the top, so the filter and coffee does not come out easily. Possibly a minor problem for some, but they are bulk packaged in a bag with no box. I have to wonder if the paper is as safe as it should be, or whether it contains chemicals. Review 19: rating 5.0. OPTIONAL PAPER FILTERS FOR EKOBREW - GREAT VALUE FOR 4 CENTS EACH GREAT SUPPLEMENT TO THE EKOBREW CUP, THEY WORK FINE AND THIS ELIMINATED MY MAKING FILTERS BY HAND. I USE FILTERS IN THE EKOBREW TO ALLOW A CLEANUP PROCESS THATS AS QUICK AND EASY AS POSSIBLE. WITH THE USE OF A FORK, I AM ABLE TO REMOVE THE USED FILTER AND 98% OF THE OLD COFFEE GRINDS WITHIN A COUPLE OF SECONDS. I USUALLY MAKE UP A BATCH OF 12 EKOBREW CUPS AT A TIME. AFTER RINSING THE EKOBREW CUPS, I ALLOW THE RINSED CU... Review 20: rating 5.0. Cute little money savers Okay, I admit it. I've been a Keurig hold-out because I thought it was a money pit to have to buy all those K-Cups instead of one nice, big container of your favorite coffee. I had other reservations, too - you couldn't control how weak or strong your coffee would come out, you had to accept Keurig's cup sizes, etc. One by one, however, Keurig managed to address and overcome each of my objections - except the thing about being wasteful with buying K-Cups. ...
reference_output: rating 1.0. not any good anymore update:They changed these filters and they are more coarse.  They now cause the water to run over in the Keurig.  They are more difficult to fit into the refill cups.  I have stopped using the filters and now started removing some of the grinds gently and am soaking the the refill cups in water to soften the remaining grinds.  They are easier to clean that way.

persona: This customer prioritizes product reliability and functionality, especially in everyday use, and is highly sensitive to defects that compromise performance; they are likely to avoid the brand after repeated failures and value consistent, high-quality results over price or convenience.
reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Not strong enough - They break 75% of the time I bought these for use in the EZ-Cup 2.0, so my comments are valid only for that use. These may work well in with other K-Cup systems, but not with the EZ-Cup. Nearly every brew will have a few coffee grounds, and I've had several with a complete blow out of the filter. I bought these thinking I'd save a bit of money over the EZ-Cup brand and I liked that they were unbleached. But I used the EZ-Cup brand for over a year and never once ha... Review 2: rating 1.0. Coffee grounds in my cup We have the EZ cup refillable container but unfortunately this filter breaks every time I make coffee allowing the grounds to get into my brewed coffee. I have to use 2 filters at a time in order to now get grounds in my mug. Not terrible, but not as economic as I would like. Review 3: rating 1.0. 👎awful taste Taints the flavor of coffee sent back Review 4: rating 3.0. Fine if you don’t care that it takes 2 each cup The problem with these is that they break every time you brew a cup of coffee giving you grounds in your coffee. Only remedy is to use 2 every time- not good. Review 5: rating 1.0. Garbage They completely disintegrate in the brewing process pretty much making them useless for their intended purpose... Review 6: rating 1.0. Dont buy unless you love to drink your coffee grounds Tons of coffee grounds in up in every cup! The other kind I have dosen't. Review 7: rating 1.0. Too thin Our Kuerig is 6 months old and we brew anywhere from 4 to 6 cups of coffee per day. We were really hoping these unbleached filters would work mostly because they are less expensive. rating 2.0. DONT INSTALL THE BELT! Purchased May 2022 for the rollers and drum getting torn up on my LG dryer. Replaced the whole drum and rollers with these upgraded ones. reference_output:
rating 4.0. Great tool at a low price I needed something for a primary purpose: pushing things through the disposal's splash guard. I don't typically look for the cheapest thing out there, but look for the best thing for the job. Others cost more, but would hardly bankrupt anybody. Yet this one does the job and more. It sits in the opening in a way that won't damage the splash guard below. It can be left so that the bottom ring is flush with the flange, so water drains and most particles will wash down the drain, yet items won't fall in. It's practical for pushing larger items, can be pushed down to use as a stopper, and comes with multiple rings so appropriately sized ones can be used.

Setting it up merely required putting on the rings. The instructions hinted that their tips would make it easier, giving me the impression that it would be harder than I might have hoped for without instructions. Yet it was easy enough that no instructions or tricks were really needed. The rings did all come pressed together and at first glance they seemed to have multiple grooves, but once I pulled them apart from each other, the rest was simple.

I had initially considered buying this together with a few alternatives so I could see which one I liked best. Then I decided that if I didn't like this one, it was cheap enough that I could always buy something else if it didn't work out. I'm glad that I got this first. It's everything I need.

rating 5.0. Works Great I waited a month to write this review.

Have used this little gem almost daily.

It cleans well, and is easy to use. You can NOT use it like a regular washer. These type of units are designed to be used with supervision.

Although it comes with fill hose I use my shower head. Set it in my shower for complete cycle.

It's true, the spin cycle is not great. Doesn't really extract enough water and it's hard to seat the spin basket. I don't use it, this was strictly purchased to wash as I have a great spinner.

It does the job and I'm very happy with it.

It makes ice quickly and quietly! I am beyond happy with this purchase! Review 18: rating 1.0. BUYER BEWARE BUYER BEWARE. PUMP WENT OUT AFTER 6 WEEKS!!! JUST OUTSIDE OF AMAZON’S RETURN WINDOW. Review 19: rating 1.0. Stops working JUST after 30 days. Huge leak Works fine but then started leaking after day 30. Very annoying Review 20: rating 1.0. Dead Ice Maker We really enjoyed our ice maker while it lasted. After about a month of use the machine began making a terrible screeching noise when making ice. A bit of research suggested we may need to clean with a descaling solution. This had to be done at least every couple weeks. It seemed to get worse and we saw metal particles in the water reservoir and occasionally the ice bin. Again more cleaning and descaling. Finally today the machine just quit. It will run a cleaning cycl...
reference_output: rating 5.0. I'm addicted to Sonic ice and can't get enough If you love Sonic ice as much as I do then you know what it's like when you drop by Sonic for a bag of their ice, rush home toss it in your freezer hoping to keep the refreeze clumping to a minimum......only to have a dickens of a time busting it up....UGH After reviewing several models of counter ice makers I chose this one. It appears the company has been around and the product has several good reviews. It does take quite awhile for the basket to fill so you will need to plan ahead. I usually make several gallon sized bags during the weekend and freeze them for the week. No matter how quickly I transfer the bag to my freezer it will still clump a little. but, nothing like the Sonic ice. A few bangs on your counter will separate each little 'morsel and viola, tiny little chunks of bliss in your glass. Freshly made ice is chewy and exactly like I like it. I recommend this brand and hope you enjoy it as much as I have.

rating 4.0. Great freezer - bad manual... Good freezer, though I think the instructions need to be better... It seems that when the freezer is set to MAX, there is some kind of quick-freeze setting that is not mentioned in the manual. With my freezer, I set the temperature to MAX on the initial use, because it is hot out here in the desert, even in the middle of winter. The freezer refused to go below 10 degrees with about 4 gallons of water inside. In fact, it would go down to 10, then drift back up to 20, before going back to 10.

I moved the freezer, thinking it was not getting enough airflow, and it did the same thing, after testing for two days, I shut it off. The next day, I turned it back on, but only set it to medium. With a few hours, it was at 0 degrees, and by the next day it was below zero.

I think the MAX setting must runt the compressor constantly, then cycle the compressor off after a while to avoid overheating it, while the lower settings can turn the compressor on and off at will.

Again, this was not mentioned in the manual, but another brand of freezer I have has a similar setting, so I should have known. (Should be stated in the manual though.)

I did let the freezer stand for over 24 hours before using it to avoid problems from shipping, though the manual only recommends 2 hours. That seems insufficient, and I would recommend at least 24. Also, the manual states that "too much food" can cause the freezer to run inefficiently. Yes, if packed too tight to allow airflow, i think this is true, but the fuller a freezer is, the better it operates in my understanding. Later it warns against adding too much warm food at a time, which is a separate case.

In any case, the manual could use some serious improvement, but the freeze itself works great..
